title: Requesting the ›has-video‹ relationships when at least one exists
gherkin:
Given there exists a "TRACK LAYOUT" "Nordschleife"
And there exist 3 "has-video" relationships for "Nordschleife"
When the user requests all "has-video" relationships for "Nordschleife"
Then the request should be confirmed with status code 200
And the response should return a collection with 3 "has-video" relationships
